sources.expression:
$wpdb->get_col("SELECT `pictures`.`pid` from {$wpdb->nggpictures} `pictures`
                    JOIN (SELECT CEIL(MAX(`pid`) * RAND()) AS `pid` FROM {$wpdb->nggpictures}) AS `x` ON `pictures`.`pid` >= `x`.`pid`
                    {$where_sql}
                    AND `pictures`.`pid` MOD {$mod} = 0
                    LIMIT {$limit_int}")

$wpdb->get_col(
			"SELECT `pictures`.`pid` from {$wpdb->nggpictures} `pictures`
                    JOIN (SELECT CEIL(MAX(`pid`) * RAND()) AS `pid` FROM {$wpdb->nggpictures}) AS `x` ON `pictures`.`pid` >= `x`.`pid`
                    {$where_sql}
                    AND `pictures`.`pid` MOD {$mod} = 0
                    LIMIT {$limit_int}"
		)

$wpdb->get_col(
				"SELECT t.`term_id` FROM `{$wpdb->term_taxonomy}` tt
                                       LEFT JOIN `{$wpdb->terms}` t ON tt.`term_id` = t.`term_id`
                                       WHERE tt.`taxonomy` = 'ngg_tag' AND tt.`count` <= 0"
			)

$wpdb->get_col( $wpdb->prepare( "SELECT tt.pid FROM $wpdb->nggallery AS t INNER JOIN $wpdb->nggpictures AS tt ON t.gid = tt.galleryid WHERE t.gid = %d $exclude_clause ORDER BY tt.{$order_by} $order_dir", $id ) )

$wpdb->get_col( $wpdb->prepare( "SELECT tt.pid FROM $wpdb->nggallery AS t INNER JOIN $wpdb->nggpictures AS tt ON t.gid = tt.galleryid WHERE t.slug = %s $exclude_clause ORDER BY tt.{$order_by} $order_dir", $id ) )
$wpdb->get_row( $wpdb->prepare( "SELECT tt.*, t.* FROM $wpdb->nggallery AS t INNER JOIN $wpdb->nggpictures AS tt ON t.gid = tt.galleryid WHERE tt.pid = %d ", $id ) )
$wpdb->get_row( $wpdb->prepare( "SELECT tt.*, t.* FROM $wpdb->nggallery AS t INNER JOIN $wpdb->nggpictures AS tt ON t.gid = tt.galleryid WHERE tt.image_slug = %s ", $id ) )

$wpdb->get_col(
			$wpdb->prepare(
				"SELECT `tt`.`pid` FROM `{$wpdb->nggallery}` AS `t`
                        INNER JOIN `{$wpdb->nggpictures}` AS `tt` ON `t`.`gid` = `tt`.`galleryid`
                        WHERE 1 = 1 
                        {$search}
                        ORDER BY `tt`.`pid` ASC
                        {$limit_by}",
				[]
			)
		)
$wpdb->get_col( $wpdb->prepare( "SELECT term_id FROM $wpdb->terms WHERE slug IN (%s) ORDER BY term_id ASC ", $sluglist ) )

$wpdb->get_var(
				$wpdb->prepare(
					"SELECT previewpic FROM {$wpdb->nggallery} WHERE gid = %d AND previewpic = %d",
					$gallery_id,
					$image_id
				)
			)

wp_die( esc_html__( 'You do not have sufficient permissions to access this page.', 'nggallery' ) )

printf( // Translators: %1$s - Opening strong tag, do not translate. %2$s - Closing strong tag, do not translate. %3$s - Opening span tag, do not translate. %4$s - Closing strong tag, do not translate. esc_html__( '%1$sBonus%2$s: NextGEN Gallery Lite users get %3$s 50%% off%4$s regular price, automatically applied at checkout', 'nggallery' ), '', '', '', '' )
printf( __( 'You are currently using NextGEN %s.', 'nggallery' ), esc_html( ucfirst( $license_type ) ) )

$wpdb->query(
					"
                    DELETE wptr.* FROM {$wpdb->term_relationships} wptr
                    INNER JOIN {$wpdb->term_taxonomy} wptt
                    ON wptt.term_taxonomy_id = wptr.term_taxonomy_id
                    WHERE wptt.term_taxonomy_id = wptr.term_taxonomy_id
                    AND wptt.taxonomy = 'ngg_tag'
                    AND wptr.object_id NOT IN (SELECT {$image_key} FROM {$image_table})"
				)

$wpdb->get_col(
			"SELECT `pictures`.`pid` from {$wpdb->nggpictures} `pictures`
                    JOIN (SELECT CEIL(MAX(`pid`) * RAND()) AS `pid` FROM {$wpdb->nggpictures}) AS `x` ON `pictures`.`pid` >= `x`.`pid`
                    {$where_sql}
                    AND `pictures`.`pid` MOD {$mod} = 0
                    LIMIT {$limit_int}"
		)
printf( '%s', esc_url( $igw_url ), esc_url( $button_url ), esc_html( $label ) )

$wpdb->query(
					$wpdb->prepare(
						"UPDATE $wpdb->nggpictures SET
                        alttext = %s,
                        description = %s,
                        imagedate = %s
                    WHERE pid = %d",
						$alttext,
						$description,
						$timestamp,
						$image->pid
					)
				)

$wpdb->get_col(
				"SELECT t.`term_id` FROM `{$wpdb->term_taxonomy}` tt
                                       LEFT JOIN `{$wpdb->terms}` t ON tt.`term_id` = t.`term_id`
                                       WHERE tt.`taxonomy` = 'ngg_tag' AND tt.`count` <= 0"
			)
printf( esc_html__( "Congrats! You're now running the most popular WordPress gallery plugin of all time.", 'nggallery' ) )
printf( esc_html__( 'To get started, watch our two minute intro below.', 'nggallery' ) )

$wpdb->get_col( $wpdb->prepare( "SELECT tt.pid FROM $wpdb->nggallery AS t INNER JOIN $wpdb->nggpictures AS tt ON t.gid = tt.galleryid WHERE t.gid = %d $exclude_clause ORDER BY tt.{$order_by} $order_dir", $id ) )

$wpdb->get_col( $wpdb->prepare( "SELECT tt.pid FROM $wpdb->nggallery AS t INNER JOIN $wpdb->nggpictures AS tt ON t.gid = tt.galleryid WHERE t.slug = %s $exclude_clause ORDER BY tt.{$order_by} $order_dir", $id ) )
$wpdb->get_row( $wpdb->prepare( "SELECT tt.*, t.* FROM $wpdb->nggallery AS t INNER JOIN $wpdb->nggpictures AS tt ON t.gid = tt.galleryid WHERE tt.pid = %d ", $id ) )
$wpdb->get_row( $wpdb->prepare( "SELECT tt.*, t.* FROM $wpdb->nggallery AS t INNER JOIN $wpdb->nggpictures AS tt ON t.gid = tt.galleryid WHERE tt.image_slug = %s ", $id ) )

$wpdb->query(
			$wpdb->prepare(
				"INSERT INTO $wpdb->nggallery (name, slug, path, title, galdesc, pageid, previewpic, author)
													 VALUES (%s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %d, %d, %d)",
				$slug,
				$slug,
				$path,
				$title,
				$description,
				$pageid,
				$previewpic,
				$author
			)
		)

$wpdb->get_col(
			$wpdb->prepare(
				"SELECT `tt`.`pid` FROM `{$wpdb->nggallery}` AS `t`
                        INNER JOIN `{$wpdb->nggpictures}` AS `tt` ON `t`.`gid` = `tt`.`galleryid`
                        WHERE 1 = 1 
                        {$search}
                        ORDER BY `tt`.`pid` ASC
                        {$limit_by}",
				[]
			)
		)
$wpdb->get_col( $wpdb->prepare( "SELECT term_id FROM $wpdb->terms WHERE slug IN (%s) ORDER BY term_id ASC ", $sluglist ) )

$wpdb->get_var(
				$wpdb->prepare(
					"SELECT previewpic FROM {$wpdb->nggallery} WHERE gid = %d AND previewpic = %d",
					$gallery_id,
					$image_id
				)
			)
fwrite(STDERR, 'Composer detected issues in your platform:' . PHP_EOL.PHP_EOL . implode(PHP_EOL, $issues) . PHP_EOL.PHP_EOL)

preg_replace(
            '#<!--\[if [^>]+\]>.*?<!\[endif\]-->#si', // probably should generalize for all strings
            '',
            $string
        )

sanitizers.expression: esc_html(__('Invalid image file. Acceptable formats: JPG, GIF, and PNG.', 'nggallery'))
esc_html(__('Animated WebP images are not supported.', 'nggallery'))
esc_html(__('Image file too large. Maximum image dimensions supported are 30k x 30k.', 'nggallery'))
esc_html(__('Invalid image file. Acceptable formats: JPG, GIF, and PNG.', 'nggallery'))
esc_html("{$retval} is not a valid MVC template")

$this->_wpdb()->prepare(
					"ALTER TABLE `{$table_name}` ADD COLUMN `{$column_name}` {$datatype} NOT NULL DEFAULT %s",
					str_replace( "'", "\\'", $default_value )
				)

$this->_wpdb()->prepare(
					"ALTER TABLE `{$table_name}` ADD COLUMN `{$column_name}` {$datatype} NOT NULL DEFAULT %d",
					$default_value
				)
esc_html( __( 'Image file too large. Maximum image dimensions supported are 30k x 30k.', 'nggallery' ) )

$wpdb->prepare(
						"UPDATE $wpdb->nggpictures SET
                        alttext = %s,
                        description = %s,
                        imagedate = %s
                    WHERE pid = %d",
						$alttext,
						$description,
						$timestamp,
						$image->pid
					)

wp_kses_post( sprintf( __( 'We have a growing list of video tutorials to get you started. Watch some below or head over to NextGEN Gallery University on YouTube to see all available vidoes.', 'nggallery' ), esc_url( 'https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL9cmsdHslD0vIcJjBggJ-XMjtwvqrRgoM' ) ) )
wp_kses_post( sprintf( __( 'Want more? Head over to NextGEN Gallery University on YouTube.', 'nggallery' ), esc_url( 'https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL9cmsdHslD0vIcJjBggJ-XMjtwvqrRgoM' ) ) )
wp_kses_post( str_replace( '%s', 'wp-content/uploads/sites/%BLOG_ID%/nggallery/', __( 'The default setting should be %s', 'nggallery' ) ) )
$wpdb->prepare( "SELECT tt.pid FROM $wpdb->nggallery AS t INNER JOIN $wpdb->nggpictures AS tt ON t.gid = tt.galleryid WHERE t.gid = %d $exclude_clause ORDER BY tt.{$order_by} $order_dir", $id )
$wpdb->prepare( "SELECT tt.pid FROM $wpdb->nggallery AS t INNER JOIN $wpdb->nggpictures AS tt ON t.gid = tt.galleryid WHERE t.slug = %s $exclude_clause ORDER BY tt.{$order_by} $order_dir", $id )
$wpdb->prepare( "SELECT tt.*, t.* FROM $wpdb->nggallery AS t INNER JOIN $wpdb->nggpictures AS tt ON t.gid = tt.galleryid WHERE tt.pid = %d ", $id )
$wpdb->prepare( "SELECT tt.*, t.* FROM $wpdb->nggallery AS t INNER JOIN $wpdb->nggpictures AS tt ON t.gid = tt.galleryid WHERE tt.image_slug = %s ", $id )

$wpdb->prepare(
			"SELECT t.*, tt.*
                       FROM {$wpdb->nggpictures} AS t
                       INNER JOIN {$wpdb->nggallery} AS tt ON t.galleryid = tt.gid
                       WHERE t.pid IN (" . implode( ', ', array_fill( 0, count( $pids ), '%s' ) ) . ")"
				. sprintf( $exclude ? ' AND t.exclude <> 1 ' : '', [] )
				. ' ORDER BY ' . sprintf( $order === 'RAND' ? 'RAND()' : 't.pid ASC', [] ),
			...$pids
		)

$wpdb->prepare(
				"INSERT INTO $wpdb->nggallery (name, slug, path, title, galdesc, pageid, previewpic, author)
													 VALUES (%s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %d, %d, %d)",
				$slug,
				$slug,
				$path,
				$title,
				$description,
				$pageid,
				$previewpic,
				$author
			)

$wpdb->prepare(
			"SELECT t.*, tt.*   
                       FROM {$wpdb->nggallery} AS t
                       INNER JOIN {$wpdb->nggpictures} AS tt ON t.gid = tt.galleryid
                       WHERE tt.galleryid IN (" . implode( ', ', array_fill( 0, count( $album->gallery_ids ), '%s' ) ) . ")"
				. sprintf( $exclude ? ' AND tt.exclude <> 1 ' : '', [] ) . "
                       ORDER BY tt.{$order_by} {$order_dir}",
			...$album->gallery_ids
		)

$wpdb->prepare(
					" OR (tt.description LIKE %s) OR (tt.alttext LIKE %s) OR (tt.filename LIKE %s)",
					[
						'%' . $term . '%',
						'%' . $term . '%',
						'%' . $term . '%',
					]
				)

$wpdb->prepare(
				"SELECT `tt`.`pid` FROM `{$wpdb->nggallery}` AS `t`
                        INNER JOIN `{$wpdb->nggpictures}` AS `tt` ON `t`.`gid` = `tt`.`galleryid`
                        WHERE 1 = 1 
                        {$search}
                        ORDER BY `tt`.`pid` ASC
                        {$limit_by}",
				[]
			)

$wpdb->prepare(
			"SELECT {$field}, SUBSTR({$field}, %d) AS 'i' FROM {$table}
                    WHERE ({$field} LIKE %s AND CONVERT(SUBSTR({$field}, %d), SIGNED) BETWEEN 1 AND %d) OR {$field} = %s
                    ORDER BY CAST(i AS SIGNED INTEGER) DESC LIMIT 1",
			[
				strlen( "{$slug}-" ) + 1,
				$wpdb->esc_like( "{$slug}-" ) . '%',
				strlen( "{$slug}-" ) + 1,
				PHP_INT_MAX,
				$slug,
			]
		)
$wpdb->prepare( "SELECT term_id FROM $wpdb->terms WHERE slug IN (%s) ORDER BY term_id ASC ", $sluglist )
esc_html( __( 'No galleries have been yet created.', 'nggallery' ) )
esc_html( sprintf( __( 'The gallery ID=%s does not exist.', 'nggallery' ), intval( $gid ) ) )
esc_html( __( 'No album ID has been provided as parameter', 'nggallery' ) )
esc_html( sprintf( __( 'The album ID=%s does not exist.', 'nggallery' ), intval( $aid ) ) )

$wpdb->prepare(
					"SELECT `pid` FROM {$wpdb->nggpictures} WHERE `galleryid` = %d ORDER BY `sortorder` ASC LIMIT 1",
					$id
				)

$wpdb->prepare(
					"SELECT previewpic FROM {$wpdb->nggallery} WHERE gid = %d AND previewpic = %d",
					$gallery_id,
					$image_id
				)

$wpdb->prepare(
						"SELECT pid FROM {$wpdb->nggpictures} WHERE galleryid = %d ORDER BY sortorder ASC, pid ASC LIMIT 1",
						$gallery_id
					)

wp_kses_post(
				$self->get_mrss_link(
					nggMediaRss::get_mrss_url(),
					$instance['show_icon'] ?? false,
					wp_strip_all_tags( wp_unslash( $instance['mrss_title'] ?? '' ) ),
					wp_unslash( $instance['mrss_text'] ?? '' )
				)
			)
